columns.extraction_plan: The total number of patients randomly assigned to the trial is 1,313. This is stated in the 'Patients' section on page 4: 'Between March 1, 2013, and July 15, 2017, 1,313 patients were randomly assigned'. Figure A1 on page 13, the CONSORT diagram, also shows 'Total randomly assigned (N = 1,313)'.
